creator: andrew@tao11.riddles.org.uk
text:
(In reply to Adam Strohl from comment #8)

I define http_proxy (previously HTTP_PROXY) globally in login.conf (this used not to work for services and cron jobs, which is why I fixed that: see D21481 etc.). I haven't needed to use the SSL client cert options.

Looking at the curl docs, I don't see an environment variable for specifying client certs, so you could be out of luck there.
